zh.lifeSummary: Lady Susan Agnes Forde是John Clarke和Lady Sarah Warrett的女兒，於大約1394年出生在英國肯特萊坦。她於1417年與John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall在英國英格蘭肯特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1482年在英國英格蘭肯特萊坦享年89歲。

zh-hans.Combe Raleigh, Devon, England: 英国戴文可姆 雷利
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Susan Agnes Forde是John Clarke和Lady Sarah Warrett的女儿，于大约1394年出生在英国肯特萊坦。她于1417年与John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall在英国英格兰肯特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1482年在英国英格兰肯特萊坦享年89岁。

nameMeanings.name: Forde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Declan, Dermot, Aine, Fionnuala, Liam, Nuala.
English and Irish: variant of   Ford   1 and 2. This is a very common spelling in Ireland.
Norwegian (Førde): habitational name from any of numerous farmsteads named Førde (there are eleven on the west coast), from Old Norse fyrthi, dative of fjǫrthr ‘fjord’.

variants.name: Ford
meanings: English: topographic name for someone who lived near a ford (Middle English, Old English ford), or a habitational name from one of the many places called with this word, such as Ford (Durham, Herefordshire, Northumberland, Shropshire, Sussex), Ford in Sefton (Lancashire), Ford in Crediton and Ford in Holcombe Rogus (both Devon), Ford in Litton and Ford in Wiveliscombe (both Somerset).

Irish: Anglicized form (quasi-translation) of various Gaelic names, for example MacGiolla na Naomh ‘son of Gilla na Naomh’ (a personal name meaning ‘servant of the saints’), Mac Conshámha ‘son of Conshnámha’ (a personal name composed of the elements con ‘dog’ + snámh ‘to swim’), in all of which the final syllable was wrongly thought to be áth ‘ford’, and Ó Fuar(th)áin (see Foran ).

nameMeanings.name: Susan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: vernacular form of   Susanna .  Among well-known bearers are the American film stars  Susan Hayward  (  1918–75 ) and  Susan Sarandon  (  b. 1946  as  Susan Tomalin ).

variants.name: Suzan
meanings: vernacular form of   Susanna .  Among well-known bearers are the American film stars  Susan Hayward  (  1918–75 ) and  Susan Sarandon  (  b. 1946  as  Susan Tomalin ).

variants.name: Susanna
meanings: New Testament form (Luke 8:3) of the Hebrew name Shoshana (from shoshan ‘lily’, which in modern Hebrew also means ‘rose’).

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: Lady Susan Agnes Forde was born about 1394, in Wrotham, Kent, England as the daughter of John Clarke and Lady Sarah Warrett. She married John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall in 1417, in Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1482, in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 89.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Susan Agnes Forde est née environ 1394, à Wrotham, Kent, Angleterre, fille de John Clarke et Lady Sarah Warrett. Elle a épousé John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall en 1417, à Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1482, à Wrotham, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 89 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Lady Susan Agnes Forde wurde um 1394 in Wrotham, Kent, England, als Tochter von John Clarke und Lady Sarah Warrett geboren. Sie hat 1417 in Kent, England, United Kingdom John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1482 im Alter von 89 Jahren in Wrotham, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Susan Agnes Forde è nata il circa 1394 nel Wrotham, Kent, England come figlia di John Clarke e Lady Sarah Warrett. Lei sposato John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall nel 1417, nel Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1482, nel Wrotham, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 89 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Susan Agnes Fordeは約1394年にイギリスケントウロサムでJohn ClarkeとLady Sarah Warrettの娘として生まれた。1417年にイギリスイギリスケントでJohn Clark I Baron Of Forde Hallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1482年にイギリスイギリスケントウロサムで89歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Lady Susan Agnes Forde(은)는 대략 1394년 영국 켄트 로섬에서 John Clarke(와)과 Lady Sarah Warrett의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1417년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트에서 John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1482년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 로섬에서 89세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Susan Agnes Forde nasceu aproximadamente 1394, em Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra filha de John Clarke e Lady Sarah Warrett. Ela casou-se com John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall em 1417, em Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1482, em Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 89 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Lady Susan Agnes Forde родилась около 1394 г. в местности ротам, кэнт, Англия. Её родителей звали John Clarke и Lady Sarah Warrett. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall в 1417 г. в местности кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1482 г. в местности ротам, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 89 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Lady Susan Agnes Forde nació aproximadamente 1394, en Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra como hija de John Clarke y Lady Sarah Warrett. Se casó con John Clark I Baron Of Forde Hall en 1417, en Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1482, en Wrotham, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 89 años.
